design_philosophy.core_loop: Pilot attack helicopter through scrolling military environments, destroy enemy waves and bosses using standard shots and bombs, collect power-ups to switch weapons, avoid collisions and enemy fire
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource management (bomb stock, firepower levels) against escalating enemy density and bullet patterns; risk-reward of aggressive bombing versus defensive positioning
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Commanding an elite attack helicopter against overwhelming military forces; stress relief through explosive bomb mechanics
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Bomb system designed explicitly for aggressive stress relief rather than pure defense; intentional difficulty scaling to maintain balance despite powerful tools; 'excitement of shooting and dodging' as core design principle; FM synthesis soundtrack and hand-drawn pixel art as artistic commitments

difficulty.lives_system: Start with two lives; bonus lives awarded at point thresholds and continuously at subsequent thresholds
difficulty.continues_system: Arcade continue system; insert credits to resume after game over
difficulty.checkpointing: Region-dependent: checkpoint system in some versions (respawn at last checkpoint reached) or respawn system (immediate respawn at death location)
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Weapon switching via colored power-ups (red, blue, green, yellow) allows tactical adaptation; bomb stock management requires strategic pickup collection; firepower penalties on hit create escalating difficulty stakes

progression.upgrade_system: Temporary weapon swaps via colored carrier pickups; firepower increments via 'S' icons; bomb stock via 'B' icons; 1-ups and gold medal bonuses (3000 points)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Ten sequential levels each with mandatory boss encounter; completion triggers second loop with increased enemy density and denser bullet patterns
replayability_hooks: Second loop difficulty increase after completing all ten levels
Score-based progression toward bonus lives encouraging replay for high scores
Multiple weapon types to master and experiment with across playthroughs
Regional checkpoint/respawn variations affect routing and strategy

world_building_techniques: Military-themed visual design (tanks, battleships, artillery as enemies)
Helipad landing sequences mark level completion
Progressive environmental scrolling establishes combat zones

boss_design.philosophy: One mandatory boss encounter per level (10 bosses total); designed to require pattern recognition and resource management under pressure; difficulty scaling across ten levels with loop repetition intensifying patterns

faction_indicators: Opposing military forces (tanks, battleships, artillery units)
danger_signals: Escalating bullet density in second loop
Boss encounters forcing resource commitment decisions
Firepower penalties creating vulnerability windows after damage
environmental_storytelling: Military supply chain visible through enemy carrier weapon pickups
Progression through diversified combat zones (land, sea, mixed)
Victory helipad as safe zone contrast to active combat

sources_used: Wikipedia: Twin Cobra (gameplay section, development section)
